summary: Frontend-only Futuria Brochure app tested end-to-end via Playwright. All 3 editor tabs, form fields, list add/remove, live preview updates, Italian placeholders, 3-theme selector, and PDF download work correctly. No console or page errors detected during load, interactions, or jsPDF generation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is fully client-side (React + jsPDF). No backend to test. All data-testids present and functional: tab-a/tab-center/tab-b, a-name/a-company/a-doctype, a-cov-N/a-adv-N/a-exc-N with a-cov-add etc., center-* fields, logo-upload-btn/logo-input, b-* fields, theme-selector with theme-futuria/theme-ardesia/theme-bordeaux, brochure-preview, download-pdf-btn. PDF downloads as brochure-futuria.pdf. Italian placeholders confirmed (e.g., 'Vita Protetta Plus').

test_details.load: OK - topbar 'Futuria Brochure' visible, preview visible
test_details.tabs: All 3 tabs switch correctly and show correct fields
test_details.live_preview_updates: Verified: typing a-name updates left panel, center-product updates center, b-name updates right (mirrored) panel
test_details.placeholders: Italian example placeholders present (e.g. 'Vita Protetta Plus')
test_details.pdf_download: download event fired, filename=brochure-futuria.pdf, 0 console errors, 0 page errors
